name: AERmon.dmsSouth30
title: Dimethyl Sulphide (DMS) Mole Fraction
description: Mole fraction is used in the construction mole\_fraction\_of\_X\_in\_Y, where X is a material constituent of Y.
processing note: This is a regional subset of the variable. If you are producing the global equivalent of AERmon.dmsSouth30, you should omit this regional South30 version.
